channel.title: jstestlite on T++
channel.description: Recent content in jstestlite on T++

item.title: JsTestLite
item.description: Have you ever wanted to just check out someone’s Jasmine unit test’s without having to set up an environment? Or maybe you wanted a quick and easy space to write and run some of your own tests. Well, I’ve made something just for you: jsTestLite. It’s jsFiddle for Jasmine unit tests. Write your code, write your tests, and watch them run as you type (with a short debounce) in the results section.
